mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments(id, body, user_id, article_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{comment.id}, #{comment.body}, #{comment.userId}, #{comment.articleId}, #{comment.createdAt}, #{comment.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id commentId, body commentBody, user_id commentUserId, article_id commentArticleId, created_at commentCreatedAt FROM comments WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id commentId, body commentBody, user_id commentUserId, article_id commentArticleId, created_at commentCreatedAt FROM comments WHERE id = #{id} AND article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT id commentId, body commentBody, user_id commentUserId, article_id commentArticleId, created_at commentCreatedAt FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
